title: Chat/typing: typing indicator method
description:
Implement Chat/typing in methods/chat.rs:
- Request: accountId, chatId, typing (bool)
- Response: accountId
- Client-side debounce: coalesce keypress events, send typing:true at most once per ~1s
- Client-side 3s rate limit guard: do not send if last call was within 3s
- Send typing:false on message send or 10s idle
- No error expected from server (rate-limited calls silently discarded)
- Unit test: debounce logic; integration test: wiremock asserts correct request shape

Fixture file: tests/fixtures/chat_typing.json
close_reason: Implementation and tests already present from prior work
